texto: It's true,' Vanya now, 'look at the forms of capitalist expression. Pornographies: pornographies of love, erotic love, Christian love, boy-and-his-dog, pornographies of sunsets, pornographies of killing, and pornographies of deduction--ahh, that sigh when we guess the murderer--all these novels, these films and songs they lull us with, they're approaches more comfortable and less so, to that Absolute Comfort.' A pause to allow Rudi a quick and sour grin. 'The self-induced orgasm.
explicacao: Citação de Thomas Pynchonchon sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “It's true,' Vanya now, 'look at the forms of capitalist expression. Pornographies: pornographies …” articula amor, capitalism, control em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como control e love.
